close_reason:
Resolved by 51ca2320b while closing fz-rh2.18.9.12; no additional source change was required for this ticket.

Verification after 51ca2320b:
- /opt/homebrew/bin/timeout 120s cargo test --lib compiler2::compiler2_test::compiler2_compile_root_jit_consumes_native_program_without_legacy_prepare -- --exact --nocapture: passed, returned expected 42 path.
- /opt/homebrew/bin/timeout 120s cargo test --lib compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_native_program_jit_runs_quicksort_through_compiler2_codegen -- --exact --nocapture: passed alone.
- Temp CLI root-entry check renaming fixture entry/0 to main/0: target/debug/fz2 --log-telemetry <tmp> run <tmp-src> exited rc=0 with runtime process_exited halt_value=42, 1,259 telemetry events, 1,303,504 bytes.

Concurrency caveat is tracked separately in fz-rh2.18.9.18: the quicksort native/JIT tests can cross-contaminate when run in parallel, but both deterministic exact tests now pass alone.
description:
Goal
Make `compiler2::compiler2_test::compiler2_compile_root_jit_consumes_native_program_without_legacy_prepare` preserve the quicksort `entry/0` result. It currently fails exactly with `left: 3`, `right: 42`, while `compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_native_program_jit_runs_quicksort_through_compiler2_codegen` passes when it compiles the native program captured after a full `compiler.drive()`.

Signal
- `/opt/homebrew/bin/timeout 120s cargo test --lib compiler2::compiler2_test::compiler2_compile_root_jit_consumes_native_program_without_legacy_prepare -- --exact --nocapture` passes.
- Root-driven `compile_root_jit` and the full-drive native-program path produce the same root entry behavior for `fixtures2/00020_quicksort_jit_entry.fz`.
- A temp/root-entry CLI or equivalent telemetry confirms the native entry no longer exits with `halt_value=3` for the `dbg(qsort(...)); 42` shape.

Strategy
Compare the native program produced by `native_program_for_root` against the final native_program telemetry payload from a full drive. Repair the fact/root-driving handoff or native-program replacement boundary; do not paper over by changing expected values, adding a special quicksort branch, or hiding the front-door path behind the test helper.

Outro
No front-door/native-program divergence, no stale root-driven NativeProgram, no quicksort-specific codegen branch, and no legacy planner fallback.
title: Compiler2 JIT front door: compile_root_jit uses wrong quicksort entry program
